name: bind_variable_to_node
description: Bind a local variable to a node property, so the property is driven by the variable's value. Use 'fillColor' to bind a COLOR variable to the node's fill color. Use other fields (opacity, width, height, cornerRadius, itemSpacing, paddingTop, paddingRight, paddingBottom, paddingLeft) for FLOAT variables.

field.description: Property to bind: fillColor | opacity | width | height | cornerRadius | itemSpacing | paddingTop | paddingRight | paddingBottom | paddingLeft

nodeId.description: Target node ID in colon format e.g. 4029:12345
